scripts.build: node -e "require('node:fs').rmSync('dist', { recursive: true, force: true })" && pnpm build-deps && tsc -p tsconfig.json
scripts.build-deps: pnpm --filter @massion/storage exec tsc -p tsconfig.json && pnpm --filter @massion/identity exec tsc -p tsconfig.json && pnpm --filter @massion/governance exec tsc -p tsconfig.json && pnpm --filter @massion/organization exec tsc -p tsconfig.json && pnpm --filter @massion/work exec tsc -p tsconfig.json && pnpm --filter @massion/subscriptions exec tsc -p tsconfig.json && pnpm --filter @massion/router exec tsc -p tsconfig.json && pnpm --filter @massion/runtime exec tsc -p tsconfig.json && pnpm --filter @massion/context-strategy exec tsc -p tsconfig.json && pnpm --filter @massion/evidence exec tsc -p tsconfig.json && pnpm --filter @massion/assurance exec tsc -p tsconfig.json && pnpm --filter @massion/records exec tsc -p tsconfig.json && pnpm --filter @massion/software-engineering exec tsc -p tsconfig.json && pnpm --filter @massion/growth exec tsc -p tsconfig.json && pnpm --filter @massion/extension-sdk exec tsc -p tsconfig.json && pnpm --filter @massion/extension-host exec tsc -p tsconfig.json
